name: Moneytree
description_short: Moneytree is a Colorado-based financial services company offering installment loans, check cashing, wire transfers, and prepaid cards with same-day funding options.
description_long: Moneytree is a financial services provider operating physical branch locations across Colorado, including a Colorado Springs location on N Academy Boulevard. The company has been serving consumers seeking quick access to cash and short-term credit solutions. Moneytree's primary service offerings include installment loans ranging from $100–$525 for first-time borrowers, check cashing services (personal, government, payroll, insurance, settlement, and cashier's checks), wire transfers, and prepaid card services. The company positions itself as a convenient alternative to traditional banking for consumers needing immediate liquidity or cash access services. Moneytree distinguishes itself through multiple funding delivery options (cash, ACH, or instant debit card funding in approximately 30–45 minutes), extended repayment terms on installment loans (up to six months based on the example provided), and accessible loan minimums. However, borrowers should note that Moneytree's APR for installment loans is extremely high—the disclosed example shows 100.92% APR on a six-month $325 loan, meaning a $325 loan costs $95 in finance charges (29% of the principal). The company's website includes a consumer notice acknowledging that small-dollar loans used over long periods can be expensive. Moneytree does not serve active-duty military members under the Military Lending Act. The company operates extended hours (9 AM–7 PM Monday–Saturday, closed Sundays) and maintains a 4.5-star rating on their location page.
address: 1508 N Academy Blvd, Colorado Springs, CO 80909

company_info.headquarters: 1508 N Academy Blvd, Colorado Springs, CO 80909

pros: Multiple funding delivery methods: cash, ACH transfer, or instant debit card funding (approximately 30–45 minutes)
Low initial loan amounts ($100 minimum) accessible to first-time borrowers with approval
Extended repayment terms up to six months with biweekly payment schedules
Convenient physical branch locations in Colorado with extended operating hours (9 AM–7 PM most days)
Diverse check cashing services accepting personal, government, payroll, insurance, and settlement checks
Additional financial services including wire transfers and prepaid cards at single locations
4.5-star customer rating on the location page
cons: Extremely high APR of 100.92% on installment loans (disclosed example), making this a very expensive borrowing option
First-time borrower loan caps at $525 maximum, limiting access for those needing larger amounts
Finance charges represent 29% of the principal on the disclosed $325 six-month loan example
Requires open checking account and proof of income to qualify for installment loans
Company explicitly warns that small-dollar loans used over long periods can be expensive
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash access and willing to accept high-cost short-term debt
Individuals seeking check cashing services without a traditional bank account
First-time borrowers with minimal credit history needing small emergency loans under $600
Consumers valuing extended evening and weekend hours for financial transactions
diagnosis: Moneytree is best suited for consumers in immediate financial crisis who lack access to traditional banking and can absorb extremely high interest costs. The critical caveat is that at 100%+ APR, these loans should only be considered for genuine emergencies, as the cost of borrowing is exceptionally steep compared to credit cards, personal loans, or credit union options.
services: Check cashing (personal, government, payroll, insurance, settlement, cashier's checks)
ACH bank transfers for loan funding
